content:
🚨 We Are Hiring at Integreon! 🚨
📌 Position: Associate – Immigration
✅ 0–3 years of Experience
📍 Location: Goregaon, Mumbai

Join Integreon and be a part of a team that supports global immigration processes.

📅 Walk-In Interview Details:
📌 Location: Integreon Office, Goregaon
🗓 Monday to Friday
⏰ 10:00 AM to 1:00 PM

✨ P.S. We’re looking for enthusiastic, career-driven individuals—walk in with your updated resume and take the first step toward shaping your future with Integreon!

Anish Joseph (He/Him/His)Jinal BalsaraPraveena PrakashSamantha DsouzaNevil ChhedaSatish DevadigaDevendra Hattangadi
comment: Walk-in drives for immigration roles often see high volumes; clear pre-screening criteria helps reduce mismatch, especially given constant regulatory updates across jurisdictions.
